courseTitle: Advanced AI, Simulation, and Procedural Systems
title: AI Director Game
genericDescription: Pace challenge dynamically; model player intensity; control spawning, resources, or events through a director system.
specificDescription: Build a game with an AI director that changes encounter pressure based on player state. Include a timeline visualization or post-run log of director decisions.
gradingRubric: 30 pts director logic; 20 pts pacing quality; 20 pts fairness; 15 pts visualization/log; 15 pts notes.
